title: Kursk: Drone incoming

title_uk: Курськ: Дрон входить
description: 260 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of April 4 (from 18:00 on April 3), the enemy attacked 286 strike UAVs of the Shahed, Gerbera, Italmas and other types from the directions: Shatalovo, Bryansk, Kursk, Orel, Millerovo, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation, about 200 of them - "shahedis". The air attack was repulsed by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, EW units and unmanned systems,...
description_en: 260 ENEMY UAVS SHOT DOWN/SUPPRESSED On the night of April 4 (from 18:00 on April 3), the enemy attacked 286 strike UAVs of the Shahed, Gerbera, Italmas and other types from the directions: Shatalovo, Bryansk, Kursk, Orel, Millerovo, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation, about 200 of them - "shahedis". The air attack was repulsed by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, EW units and unmanned systems,...
description_uk: ЗБИТО/ПОДАВЛЕНО 260 ВОРОЖИХ БПЛА ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ У ніч на 04 квітня (з 18:00 03 квітня) противник атакував 286 ударними БпЛА типу Shahed, Гербера, Італмас та безпілотниками інших типів із напрямків: Шаталово, Брянськ, Курськ, Орел, Міллєрово, Приморсько-Ахтарськ – рф., близько 200 із них – "шахеди". Повітряний напад відбивали авіація, зенітні ракетні війська, підрозділи РЕБ та безпілотних систем,...

title: Drone strike
title_en: Drone strike
title_uk: Безпілотний удар
description: Last night, drones "walked" over the chemical plants in Tolyatti of the Samara region of the Goryat enterprises "Tolyattikauchuk" and "KuibyshevAzot". Locals write that there has never been such a massive attack. Taganrog was also hit. The local authorities recognized the damage to the warehouses, as well as the vessel, which was located not far from the port.
description_en: Last night, drones "walked" over the chemical plants in Tolyatti of the Samara region of the Goryat enterprises "Tolyattikauchuk" and "KuibyshevAzot". Locals write that there has never been such a massive attack. Taganrog was also hit. The local authorities recognized the damage to the warehouses, as well as the vessel, which was located not far from the port.
description_uk: Дроны этой ночью «прошлись» по химическим заводам в Тольятти Самарской области Горят предприятия «Тольяттикаучук» и «КуйбышевАзот». Местные пишут, что такой массированной атаки еще не было. Также под удар попал Таганрог. Местные власти признали повреждение складов, а также судна, находившегося неподалеку от порта.

description: While Ukraine aid runs dry, Trump asks for record-breaking $1.5 trillion in military spending. The proposed budget calls for a $445 billion (44%) increase in defense funds in 2027 — as U.S. military aid to Ukraine has dropped by 99% under Trump's watch.
description_en: While Ukraine aid runs dry, Trump asks for record-breaking $1.5 trillion in military spending. The proposed budget calls for a $445 billion (44%) increase in defense funds in 2027 — as U.S. military aid to Ukraine has dropped by 99% under Trump's watch.
description_uk: While Ukraine aid runs dry, Trump asks for record-breaking $1.5 trillion in military spending. The proposed budget calls for a $445 billion (44%) increase in defense funds in 2027 — as U.S. military aid to Ukraine has dropped by 99% under Trump's watch.

description: Russia's banks face major service outages amid internet crackdown. Long lines formed at shops, restaurants, and gas stations in multiple Russian cities on April 3, as establishments could only accept cash payments. The outage may be connected to the Kremlin's restriction of VPNs.

description: Ukraine, Russia waging shadow war in Libya, RFI reports. Around 200 Ukrainian troops are based in Libya in cooperation with the government in Tripoli, sources told Radio France Internationale. These forces are allegedly responsible for the March 3 strike on a Russian oil tanker in the Mediterranean Sea.
